version_description: The original seems to be in G# so I changed it to A. Chords in other versions don't sound right to me, too many chords, so I have shown how I play it.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                                           [ch]A[/ch]
All through the night,        I'll be awake and I'll be with you[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]E[/ch]                                     [ch]A[/ch]
All through the night, this precious time when time is new[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                       [ch]C#m[/ch]                                    [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, all through the night today;        knowing that we feel the sad without saying[/tab]

[Chorus 1]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
We have no past, we won't reach back  keep with me forward all through the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
And once we start the meter clicks  and it goes running all through the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]       [ch]F#m[/ch]                [ch]C#m[/ch]                 [ch]A[/ch]
Until it ends, there is no end[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                                             [ch]A[/ch]
All through the night,  stray cat is crying, so stray cat sings back[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]                                             [ch]A[/ch]
All through the night,  they have forgotten what by day they lack[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                         [ch]C#m[/ch]                                  [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, under those white street lamps;     there is a little chance they may see[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]          [ch]F#m[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
We have no past, we won't reach back  keep with me forward all through the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]            [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Bm[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
And once we start the meter clicks  and it goes running all through the night[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
Until it ends, there is no end[/tab]

[Interlude]
[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]      x2

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                         [ch]C#m[/ch]                                   [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]E[/ch]
Oh, the sleep in your eyes is enough     Let me be there, let me stay there awhile[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
We have no past we won't reach back;  keep with me forward all through the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
And once we start the meter clicks;  and it goes running all through the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
Until it ends, there is no end;  keep with me forward all through the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]F#m[/ch]                 [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]Bm[/ch]          [ch]E[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]
And once we start the meter clicks;  and it goes running all through the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]         [ch]F#m[/ch]               [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]
Until it ends there is no end[/tab]

[Outro]
[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]Bm[/ch]  [ch]E[/ch]
